drawer.title: GAIA
drawer.subtitle: GoAuto Intelligent Assistant
drawer.helper: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

messages.welcome:
Hi! I’m GAIA, your GoAuto AI Assistant. I can help with:

• Reviewing sales, inventory, and finance stats
• Analyzing your dealership’s performance
• Searching for specific vehicles, customers, and leads
• Offering recommendations based on your data

How can I help you today?
messages.restart: Chat reset. How can I help?
messages.error: Sorry, something went wrong: {{message}}. Please try again.
messages.defaultError: There was an error processing your message
messages.fallback: Sorry, I couldn’t process your request.

sidebar.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action cannot be undone.

dbRequired.title: Customer Database Required
dbRequired.description: To use Smart Marketing, you need to first download the customer database from Autofact.

points.1: AI needs data from your customers' previous transactions
points.2: This data helps find customers with similar preferences
points.3: The information is securely obtained from Autofact
points.4: Once downloaded, you can use all the marketing features

dbRequired.needHelpText: Contact GoAuto support to set up the data download from Autofact.

ai.howText: The AI will look for customers who bought or sold vehicles of similar brands and models.
ai.exampleText: If you select a 'Toyota Corolla', it will find customers who bought/sold Toyota Corolla, Nissan Sentra, Honda Civic, etc.

step1.title: Step 1: Smart Search Configuration
step1.description: Set parameters to find customers who bought or sold vehicles of similar brand and model using AI

similarity.whyText: A high similarity level ensures you only contact customers with truly similar preferences, avoiding spam and improving conversion chances. Very low values can result in irrelevant emails.

page.selectVehicleDesc: Choose a vehicle from your inventory to create an Instagram post
page.heroTitle: Publish your vehicles directly on Instagram
page.heroDesc: Connect your professional Instagram account and publish vehicles from your inventory with a single click. Create attractive posts without leaving GoAutos.
page.featurePublishDesc: Select vehicles and publish them on Instagram with automatically generated photos and descriptions.
page.featureManageDesc: View all your Instagram posts in one place with engagement metrics.
page.featureProfileDesc: Check your profile, followers, and account type directly from the dashboard.
page.step1: Click "Connect Instagram" and log in with your professional account.
page.step2: Authorize the permissions to publish content from GoAutos.
page.step3: Select a vehicle from your inventory and publish it with one click.
page.req2: At least one profile picture on your account
page.req3: Vehicles with uploaded photos in your inventory
